reasoning: The chart fails to answer the core of the business question for two main reasons. First, the question asks 'Wieviel Umsatz...' (How much revenue...), which implies a request for the total annual figures or at least an aggregation by year. The provided visualization shows monthly data points only. While one could theoretically sum them up mentally, it does not directly present the yearly totals requested. Second, and more critically, the chart presents the months in alphabetical order (Apr, Aug, Dez, Feb...) rather than chronological order (Jan, Feb, Mar...). This makes the time series completely unintelligible as a trend line; the lines jump back and forth across years and seasons, rendering any visual analysis of trends impossible. A business user cannot derive meaningful insights from this chaotic ordering.
suggested_improvement: Sort the data chronologically by month within each year before plotting. Additionally, consider aggregating the data to show annual totals (bars) with optional monthly breakdowns, or ensure the x-axis represents continuous time so the line chart reflects actual temporal progression.
